title: UX Research Toolkit — Touchpoints Layer
description: Layer schema extending each phase with touchpoint and channel data. Touchpoints are specific interaction moments; channels are the medium or platform through which interaction occurs.

touchpoints.description: Specific interaction points the persona encounters in this phase — physical objects, interfaces, people, or services they interact with.

channels.description: The medium or platform through which touchpoints are experienced — digital, physical, or human. More abstract than touchpoints.
